timeline:
2026-06-10 13:45:12 IST - Deployment of checkout-service v2.4.1 triggered via CI/CD pipeline
2026-06-10 13:46:03 IST - First elevated latency observed on /api/checkout
2026-06-10 13:47:10 IST - CPU usage on payment-service increased to 94%
2026-06-10 13:49:02 IST - Error rate on /api/checkout rose to 42%
2026-06-10 13:51:18 IST - PagerDuty alert fired for checkout failure threshold
2026-06-10 13:53:07 IST - On-call engineer acknowledged alert and started investigation
2026-06-10 14:00:41 IST - Stack traces point to null pointer in payment processor
2026-06-10 14:02:15 IST - Recent deployment identified as likely trigger
2026-06-10 14:08:54 IST - Decision made to roll back checkout-service to v2.4.0
2026-06-10 14:12:29 IST - Rollback completed successfully
2026-06-10 14:15:33 IST - Error rate dropped back to baseline 0.2%
2026-06-10 14:20:10 IST - Incident resolved and postmortem scheduled

diff --git a/src/checkout/processor.py b/src/checkout/processor.py
index 23ac8f1..76bd1c9 100644
--- a/src/checkout/processor.py
+++ b/src/checkout/processor.py
@@ -78,12 +78,9 @@ def process_checkout(cart, user_id, payment_method):
-    if cart is None:
-        raise ValueError("cart must not be None")
-
-    if not cart.get("items"):
-        raise ValueError("cart must contain items")
-
     total = calculate_total(cart["items"])
     tax = calculate_tax(total, user_id)
     payment_request = build_payment_request(user_id, total, tax, payment_method)
     return submit_payment(payment_request)

diff --git a/config/payment.yaml b/config/payment.yaml

+++ b/config/payment.yaml
@@ -3,8 +3,8 @@ payment:

+  request_timeout_ms: 15000
+  retry_count: 5
   circuit_breaker:

+    failure_threshold: 10
     reset_timeout_ms: 30000

preview: # Root Cause Analysis Report  ## Incident Summary - **Date:** June 10, 2026 - **Severity:** High (45 minutes) - **Duration:** Unknown end time as of report writing on the same day.
rca_markdown:
# Root Cause Analysis Report

## Incident Summary
- **Date:** June 10, 2026
- **Severity:** High (45 minutes)
- **Duration:** Unknown end time as of report writing on the same day.
- **Services Affected:** checkout-service, payment-service

## Timeline
| Time | Event                                              |
|------|----------------------------------------------------|
| 13:45:12 UTC+5:30 (June 10, 2026) | Deployment of checkout-service v2.4.1 triggered via CI/CD pipeline.   |
| 13:46:03 UTC+5:30                      | First elevated latency observed on `/api/checkout`.        |
| 13:47:10 UTC+5:30 (June 10, 2026)    | CPU usage on payment-service increased to 94%.         |
| 13:49:02 UTC+5:30                      | Error rate on `/api/checkout` rose to 42%.             |
| 13:51:18 UTC+5:30 (June 10, 2nergy sector and environmental conservation. The report will explore the ways in which sustainable mining practices can be implemented within these sectors while also considering alternative energy sources to minimize carbon footprints associated with traditional fossil fuel-based extraction processes
